desc.npq: Check NPM package security using NPQ
desc.uninstall: Remove NPM package from the system
desc.ban: Ban/Un-Ban user from accessing the bot
desc.setlang: Change bot language to another language

slot.jackpot:
🎉 **J A C K P O T ! ! !** 🎉
🔥 Crazy! You won **{reward} Quota**!

helpMessage:
*Bot Usage Guide*🛠️
Here are the commands you can use:
/start - Start conversation with the bot
/help - Show this help message
/login - Register for the first time!

Bot Script made by Alchi (Lva-Alchi)
not_registered:
Wow, Welcome {name}!

You are a new user...🤩
Please register first using /login so you can continue.
register_success:
✅ Account successfully registered

Your ID:
 USER-`{id}`
⚡ You get *{quota}* bot usage limit
alreadyRegistered:
You are already registered with 🆔 USER-`{id}`
You have *{quota}* usage limit remaining!
welcome_new:
🎉 Welcome {name}!

Your ID: `{id}`
🎁 Starting balance: *{quota} Quota*
welcome_back:
Welcome back __*{name}*__! 👋

🆔 User-`{id}`
⚡ You have *{quota}* usage quota remaining.
invalid:
Error❗
Invalid or contains forbidden characters.
missingInput: Please fill in the input parameters...
unavailable: ❗Sorry, your choice is unavailable, please see the list of options
banned:
🚫 **ACCOUNT BANNED**

Sorry, you have been banned by the Admin for violating the rules and can no longer use this bot.
signFirst:
🛑 **Access Denied!**

You are not registered in our system yet. Please register first to use the bot features.
